BTCUSDT.name: BTC Fibonacci Pullback
BTCUSDT.description: Enter on pullbacks to key Fibonacci levels in established trends. BTC's high volatility requires wider stops to avoid noise.
BTCUSDT.entry_logic: Price within 1% of 0.618, 0.5, or 0.382 Fibonacci level

indicators.rsi: 14-period, max 70 for longs, min 30 for shorts

ETHUSDT.name: ETH Momentum Breakout
ETHUSDT.description: Enter on confirmed breakouts above/below 20-period ranges. ETH responds better to momentum than pullbacks.
ETHUSDT.entry_logic: Price breaks above 20-period high + 0.5% OR below 20-period low - 0.5%
ETHUSDT.trend_filter: None - trade breakouts in both directions

BNBUSDT.name: BNB Extreme Selectivity
BNBUSDT.description: Only trade when strong trend (>5% over 10 days) meets high volume (>1.5x). BNB requires exceptional conditions.
BNBUSDT.entry_logic: Price at 0.5 Fibonacci level with extreme trend/volume

indicators.rsi: 14-period, max 65 for longs, min 35 for shorts
